case_title: PRESTON-CANTY, BRENDA JOYCE vs. WARD, DARREN,INDIVIDUAL et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PRESTON-CANTY, BRENDA JOYCE AS TO DEFENDANT WARD, DARREN,INDIVIDUAL WARD, LISA, INDIVIDUAL STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE CO. A CORP. DOES 1 TO 25 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          JAN-28-1997 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-02-1996 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       JAN-08-1997

OSC CALENDAR OF FEB-27-1997, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON FEB-27-1997, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), AND OSC TO PLTF FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH COURT RULES. $50.00 SANCTIO IMPOSED AGAINST PLTF'S COUNSEL. HEARING SET FOR APR-08-1997 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JAN-28-1997, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON JAN-28-1997, OSC FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AND COMPLY WITH COURT RULES HEARING SET FOR FEB-27-1997 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF APR-08-1997, DISMISSAL BASED ON PLTF'S FAILURE TO APPEAR TODAY, 2-27-97 OSC, PLTF'S FAILURE TO FILE POS AND SCS. DISMISSAL IS PURSUANT TO CCP 575.2 AND THE CASE OF CA CASUALTY INDEMNITY VS MENDOZA (1995) 36 CA 4TH 678.
